blueprint_items.evidence: OpenClaw memorySearch config loaded via agents.defaults.memorySearch in index.js
hindsight.js integrated in layer2_answer via hindsight.recall + hindsight.reflect, shouldUseHindsight=true gate
shouldUseMemosFallback gate in layer2_answer triggers semanticSearch only when needed (wantsQuote/wantsCause/wantsRecent/hindsight-miss)
strictQuoteMode branch in layer2_answer activates when query contains 原话/原文/怎么说, filters long K-responses
consolidate_capsules.js handles heading-based merge with upsertSection; cron expected at 15 */4 * * *

buildConsolidationPlan with existingCapsules param, hasOwnProperty check, decideAction implements: create(no file)/ignore(>80% overlap)/supersede(已确认信号)/update(不再信号)/append(default); charOverlapRatio helper exported
mergeCapsule builds full # heading / ## 已确认事实 / ## 变更记录 / ## 证据片段 skeleton on create; append→已确认事实, supersede→变更记录+替换confirmedFacts, update→变更记录+追加已确认事实, ignore→不写文件
test-blueprint-final.js: 41 assertions passed across 6 test groups (create/append/ignore/supersede/update/buildConsolidationPlan action field)
